quote: Innovation to create the training of tomorrow in 3D.
mission: Produce an initial Proof of Concept (POC) to establish a new standard for training teams and customers remotely, utilizing a fully certifying 3D App integrated with a Learning Management System (LMS).
The first step of this project was to audit Biomerieux's existing training journeys and project how interactive 3D technologies could scale globally to meet future production and educational demands.
process: The process began with organizing several interviews with internal and external stakeholders, auditing the digital environment, and testing different scalable technologies. We designed the complete UX/UI of the App and the website hosting the WebGL environment.

Initial drafts were produced using Three.js to validate the user flow. These results projected a clear path forward, allowing us to select Unreal Engine for the final, high-fidelity production. The final app design was completed alongside rigorous testing and security pentesting to ensure it was ready for enterprise deployment.
kpi: The immersive 3D application was fully adopted by teams and customers. Looking ahead to 2024 and beyond, after the global deployment of several training modules, Biomerieux expects to reduce their overall training expenses by 30% while significantly cutting their trainers' travel footprint.

The projection is highly promising: leadership has agreed to eventually transform this immersive training infrastructure into a lucrative financial asset by offering it as a premium service to their customers on a brand-new platform.
facts: How to train people effectively in a post-Covid world? How will we build the future of learning in the industry? How can we be more sustainable? These questions drive the future of Design and technology.
By recreating a highly accurate laboratory environment within a 3D app and applying the latest gamification workflows, we drastically increased learning efficiency and user retention.
intro: In 2021, I joined Biomerieux to develop a visionary immersive learning environment. My objective was to create a highly scalable, engaging new way to train teams and customers remotely. This technology, and the 3D assets developed during this project, are projected to be used across multiple future applications—from training purposes to global marketing communications. Thanks to this 3D architecture, the international pharmaceutical laboratory is actively reducing its carbon footprint, while users prefer the gamified, interactive aspect over traditional learning workflows.

galleryMetadata.description: A high-fidelity 3D laboratory environment allowing users to interact dynamically with virtual equipment like the SMASHER and DILUMAT.
